initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT p.player_name
FROM player p
JOIN player_match pm ON p.player_id = pm.player_id
JOIN match m ON pm.match_id = m.match_id
JOIN batsman_scored bs ON pm.match_id = bs.match_id AND pm.player_id = bs.striker
WHERE bs.runs_scored >= 100
  AND pm.team_id = m.match_winner;

SELECT DISTINCT p.player_name
FROM player p
JOIN player_match pm ON p.player_id = pm.player_id
JOIN match m ON pm.match_id = m.match_id
JOIN batsman_scored bs ON pm.match_id = bs.match_id
WHERE pm.team_id = m.match_winner
GROUP BY p.player_id, p.player_name, m.match_id, m.match_winner, pm.team_id
HAVING SUM(bs.runs_scored) >= 100;

SELECT DISTINCT p.player_name
FROM player p
JOIN player_match pm ON p.player_id = pm.player_id
JOIN match m ON pm.match_id = m.match_id
JOIN batsman_scored bs ON pm.match_id = bs.match_id AND pm.player_id = bs.striker
WHERE pm.team_id = m.match_winner
GROUP BY p.player_id, p.player_name, m.match_id, m.match_winner, pm.team_id
HAVING SUM(bs.runs_scored) >= 100;

SELECT DISTINCT p.player_name
FROM player p
JOIN player_match pm ON p.player_id = pm.player_id
JOIN match m ON pm.match_id = m.match_id
JOIN batsman_scored bs ON pm.match_id = bs.match_id
WHERE pm.team_id = m.match_winner
GROUP BY p.player_id, p.player_name, m.match_id, m.match_winner, pm.team_id
HAVING SUM(bs.runs_scored) >= 100;

SELECT DISTINCT p.player_name
FROM player p
JOIN player_match pm ON p.player_id = pm.player_id
JOIN match m ON pm.match_id = m.match_id
JOIN batsman_scored bs ON pm.match_id = bs.match_id
WHERE pm.team_id = m.match_winner
GROUP BY p.player_id, p.player_name, m.match_id, m.match_winner, pm.team_id
HAVING SUM(bs.runs_scored) >= 100;

aggregation.selected_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT p.player_name
FROM player p
JOIN player_match pm ON p.player_id = pm.player_id
JOIN match m ON pm.match_id = m.match_id
JOIN batsman_scored bs ON pm.match_id = bs.match_id
WHERE pm.team_id = m.match_winner
GROUP BY p.player_id, p.player_name, m.match_id, m.match_winner, pm.team_id
